meaning: v.鍏存椇,绻佽崳,鑼佸．鎴愰暱,鏃虹洓
examples: New businesses thrive in this area.
Today her company continues to thrive.
However, some birds thrive in noisy environments.
For our economy to thrive once again, we must remove these barriers to job creation.
Special offer: Is your retirement portfolio prepared to thrive in all kinds of markets?
